subject: Cross-review request: 3 domain canons DRAFT v0.1 (UZG+, AIER_LIFE, AIFI_LIFE)
authority: AMD_LANE02_AIER_CODE_ROLE_REFRAME — Lane_02 DRAFT authoring authorized; canon ACTIVATION remains NTS-only
summary: Lane_02 authored 3 domain canon DRAFTs (v0.1) for UZG+, AIER_LIFE, AIFI_LIFE. Each canon defines identity, mission, authority hierarchy, boundary (R-DOMAIN-*), lifecycle, data/privacy rules, domain-specific invariants, integration patterns, and open questions list. All DRAFT status; activation pending NTS approval after Lane_03 cross-review.
review_focus: Boundary correctness — do R-DOMAIN-* redlines cover the key domain-specific risks (medical for UZG+, autonomy for AIER_LIFE, financial regulation for AIFI_LIFE)?
Inheritance correctness — properly defer to project Canon? No accidental project-canon overrides?
Conflict detection — any conflict with active LAW_N1..N12 or project Canon §05 invariants?
Domain-specific completeness — gaps in scope coverage or missing edge cases?
Open questions list — any obvious items to add to NTS review?
Invariants list — is each invariant testable and enforceable, or is any item too vague?
boundary_note: Lane_02 strict DRAFT status; no ACTIVE marker set; SHARED_INDEX edit APPEND-only (Tier 2 new section); no edits to project Canon, SHARED/laws, SHARED/amendments, or other Lane silos. Lane_03 may suggest revisions inline via cross-review document; Lane_02 incorporates revisions via separate task before NTS review.
